evals.prompt: Create a new Supabase table called 'wartungsvertraege' (maintenance contracts) for tracking recurring service agreements with customers. Each contract should have a customer reference, start/end dates, monthly price, service description, interval (monthly/quarterly/yearly), and status. Include the migration file.
evals.expected_output: SQL migration creating wartungsvertraege table with proper RLS policies, user_id, foreign key to kunden, timestamps, CHECK constraint on status, and idempotent DDL

assertions.name: rls-enabled
assertions.description: Table has ALTER TABLE wartungsvertraege ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY

assertions.name: user-id-column
assertions.description: Table has user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL

assertions.name: user-own-policy
assertions.description: Has RLS policy with auth.uid() = user_id for user row ownership

assertions.name: service-role-policy
assertions.description: Has separate RLS policy with auth.role() = 'service_role' for n8n/Edge Function access

assertions.name: idempotent-ddl
assertions.description: Uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and DROP POLICY IF EXISTS for safe re-runs

assertions.name: german-naming
assertions.description: Table name is German (wartungsvertraege), domain columns use German names matching project conventions

assertions.name: timestamps-present
assertions.description: Has both created_at and updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() columns

assertions.name: migration-file-path
assertions.description: Output references the correct migration path format (supabase/migrations/YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_name.sql) in comments or filename, even if written to workspace for eval purposes

assertions.name: status-check-constraint
assertions.description: Status column has a CHECK constraint enumerating valid values

assertions.name: kunde-foreign-key
assertions.description: Has a foreign key reference to the kunden table

evals.prompt: Create a Supabase Edge Function called 'generate-report' that takes a date range and generates a revenue summary. It should query rechnungen for paid invoices in the range, sum up netto/brutto, and return the totals grouped by month. This will be called from the frontend by authenticated users.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript Edge Function with CORS, JWT auth, date range query on rechnungen, monthly aggregation, proper error handling

assertions.name: cors-preflight
assertions.description: Handles OPTIONS request with CORS headers including ALLOWED_ORIGIN

assertions.name: jwt-auth
assertions.description: Extracts user from JWT via Authorization header and validates authentication before proceeding

assertions.name: user-scoped-query
assertions.description: Queries rechnungen filtered by user_id from the authenticated user (not just relying on RLS)

assertions.name: date-range-filter
assertions.description: Filters rechnungen by the provided date range parameters

assertions.name: paid-status-filter
assertions.description: Only includes invoices with status 'bezahlt' (not offen, storniert, etc.)

assertions.name: error-handling
assertions.description: Has try/catch with proper error response (status 500, JSON body, CORS headers)

assertions.name: deno-imports
assertions.description: Uses correct Deno imports: serve from std, createClient from esm.sh/@supabase/supabase-js

assertions.name: correct-file-path
assertions.description: Output references the correct function path (supabase/functions/generate-report/index.ts) in comments or deploy instructions, even if written to workspace for eval purposes

evals.prompt: I need to add a pg_cron job that runs every Monday at 06:00 and calls an Edge Function to send weekly summary emails to all users. Write the SQL to set up the cron job and create the Edge Function 'weekly-summary' that queries each user's data for the past week (new kunden, new rechnungen, total revenue) and sends a summary via the email relay.
evals.expected_output: SQL for pg_cron schedule + Edge Function with service_role auth, per-user data aggregation, email relay integration, proper error handling

assertions.name: cron-schedule-correct
assertions.description: pg_cron schedule uses correct syntax: '0 6 * * 1' for Monday 06:00 UTC

assertions.name: cron-uses-pg-net
assertions.description: Cron job calls Edge Function via net.http_post with service_role key in Authorization header

assertions.name: service-role-auth
assertions.description: Edge Function validates caller has service_role key (not JWT auth)

assertions.name: per-user-iteration
assertions.description: Queries profiles or auth.users to iterate over all users, then aggregates data per user

assertions.name: week-date-filter
assertions.description: Filters data to the past 7 days using date arithmetic

assertions.name: email-relay-integration
assertions.description: Sends emails via EMAIL_RELAY_URL with EMAIL_RELAY_SECRET, not directly via SMTP

assertions.name: cors-and-error-handling
assertions.description: Has CORS preflight handler and try/catch error handling

assertions.name: no-hardcoded-secrets
assertions.description: All secrets accessed via Deno.env.get(), nothing hardcoded
